allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:4021/health | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; \(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:4021/api/matches\).matches | Select-Object id, home, away, homeScore, awayScore, minute, status | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4042 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; Write-Output "agent stopped \(pid $\($conn[0].OwningProcess\)\)" } else { Write-Output "no listener on 4042" })

PowerShell($s = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:4042/api/state; "P&L: $\($s.book.pnlUsdc\) USDC over $\($s.book.entryCount\) settlements · balance $\($s.balances.usdcBalance\)"; $s.insights | Select-Object -First 3 fixture, minute, score, headline | Format-Table -AutoSize)
